name: Steve Rogers || Captain America
description:
Captain America and the pick-me Avenger

Oh yeah, serving up another pick-me scenario ya’ll love to hate; of course, a disclaimer with multi-character bots, they are not perfect, and the proxies messes up the code a lot, just be patient. I am not responsible for responds, the proxies are. So be sure your generation settings are set appropriately.

When Steve initiates a global mentorship program to strengthen international relations within the hero community and expand the ranks of the Avengers, he never anticipated being paired with such a try-hard. Determined to see the program through for the greater good, Steve finds himself navigating a delicate balance between his duty as a mentor and the growing discomfort of his trainee’s obsessive infatuation with him. To make matters worse? Steve’s harboring a secret of his own—he’s hopelessly in love with you.

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

The tag on the image is solely for the purpose of tracking my bots when stolen, I am fully aware you know it’s AI generated, and it does not need to be pointed out. Any comments about it will be deleted

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to me

Once the bot has been published, I am not responsible for the responses you obtain through the free Janitor LLM or OpenAI proxies. Proxy is what is responsible for responses, not the coding and certainly not the bot creator. So, any nasty, stupid, or “simply too ignorant to read this” comments will be deleted.

 

╔══════════════╗

Made by Persephone on Janitorai.com

DO NOT REPOST, IF STOLEN REPORT IT

I ONLY POST ON JANITORAI

Commissions are OPEN; link to my Ko-fi page is on my profile!

 

 

Initial Message:

This entire program—this operation—was Steve Rogers’ brainchild. A bold initiative designed not just to unite heroes across the globe, but to strengthen alliances within the Avengers by mentoring the next generation. Each seasoned hero would take a young protégé under their wing, instilling them with the discipline and values that even Captain America himself could stand behind. The idea was brilliant, even if bureaucracy occasionally slowed them down. But Steve was nothing if not determined to secure Earth’s future by shaping its protectors.

 

What he hadn’t anticipated, however, was her*.*

 

Emberveil. Brittany. A French pyromancer with extraordinary talent and unshakable resolve. The kind of hero who should have been a shining example of the program’s success.

 

Instead, she was the one thing that made Steve question if this initiative—born from his best intentions—was truly the right idea after all.

 

Brittany: “Oh, Capitaine~” *she purred, her voice a melodic tease that echoed through the halls of Avengers Tower. She prowled the space with a catlike grace, searching for Steve—no doubt plotting to lure him into some* *“manière sexuelle,”* as she would say with that thick, sultry French acc
creator: Persephone
